content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs (~777 LOC) and the one-line registration in src/test_support/mod.rs. Verified API contracts against the supporting infrastructure (TempWorkspaceBuilder, materialize_bundle, BeadGraphIssue/Dependency, MockBrAdapter/MockBvAdapter, BrCommand/BvCommand, BeadDetail/BeadSummary/DependencyRef/NextBeadResponse) and confirmed: (1) TempWorkspace fields accessed by the fixture (milestones, audit_root, live_root, beads_root) exist and have pub visibility; (2) materialize_bundle's store argument order matches the call at lines 72-81, and it emits exactly one PlanDrafted event for a fresh milestone (plan_version==1) with progress.total_beads = bead_count() = 3; (3) the mock response tape (11 br responses + 1 bv response) is consumed in exactly the order the smoke test replays, and every stdout format matches what exec_json/exec_read will parse — including that DependencyRef accepts both 'dependency_type' and 'kind' via serde alias, while the separately-tested .beads/issues.jsonl field is 'type' (from SerializedBeadGraphDependency's rename); (4) DependencyKind Display, ParentChild variant, BeadStatus::Closed snake_case serialization, and BeadPriority/BeadType invariants all align with the JSON the fixture emits; (5) BrCommand::create/close/sync_flush/list/show produce the exact args vector the test asserts; (6) scenario_timestamp is deterministic and the workspace's TempDir auto-cleans on drop. Ran `cargo test --lib test_support::e2e_fixtures` — the smoke test passes in <0.01s, well under the <1s target. Ran `cargo check --tests --lib` — clean. Ran `cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings` — failures exist but are entirely in pre-existing files (br_process.rs, fs.rs, milestone.rs, project.rs, service.rs, completion.rs) unmodified by this branch (confirmed via `git diff master...HEAD`); none are in e2e_fixtures.rs. No correctness bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found in the changes under review.

## Amendments

None.
